name: Haebernes Mus (Oatmeal Mush)
recipeIngredient: 500 g Oatmeal (OR wheat flour) (a generous lb)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, brown the oatmeal slightly.
2. Add water and salt to the oatmeal in the skillet.
3. Fry the thick dough in lard in a cast iron skillet, tearing it into pieces as you cook.
Serves 4.
From: D'SCHWAEBISCH' KUCHE' by Aegidius Kolb and Leonhard Lidel, Allgaeuer Zeitungsverlag, Kempten. 1976. (Translation/Conversion: Karin Brewer)
